London, United Kingdom

ProLuxe Bureau

One name to call. One record for every booking. We handle the rest.

Bureau is the console we built for our office. Every hotel, every room, every change held against your principal's programme. You see the output: tighter operations, fewer surprises, the same person to call when something moves.

01 / Every booking in one programme view.

Every booking in one programme view.

Live status across every hotel and city. Filter by trip, by date, by hotel. The view your team sees is the view we work from.

02 / Changes handled in 2 steps.

Changes handled in 2 steps.

Edit a booking in place, or pass it back to us with one click. No re-explaining, no reconciling. The hotel sees the same record we do.

03 / Every confirmation, timestamped.

Every confirmation, timestamped.

Every change is logged with who, what, and when. If a question comes up later, the answer is in the file.

How it works for your office

We configure Bureau before your team logs in. Hotels, room categories, rates, daily holds, all reflecting what we have already negotiated. From there, every booking sits in one place.

If something needs to change, you adjust it in place. If it needs us, you pass it back. Either way, the trail is clean and the hotel works from the same record.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/programmes/autumn-run/principal

Edinburgh, Amsterdam, Munich, Vienna

Geneva, Paris, Davos

Singapore, Tokyo, Hong Kong

All bookings Confirmed Pending Changes this week
Record Dates Room Status

Always on hand

If you would rather hand a booking back, pass it to us directly. We pick it up, the audit log shows the handoff, and you carry on with the next thing.

Pass back

Rate or room change, new category, date shift, or upgrade request needing director-level sign-off.
Last-minute move, venue or hotel change inside 48 hours with knock-on bookings to rearrange.
Anything escalated, a complaint, a billing dispute, a property question that needs a direct hotel relationship to resolve.

We are taking on a small number of new principals' programmes for the second half of 2026. If you are setting up your principal's next year of travel, let us know.

Speak with us

Corporate & luxury travel management.
